items.title: Sources: Chelsea prioritise exit for Garnacho
items.summary: Chelsea are demanding €50 million ($57m) for Alejandro Garnacho after the winger did not report back to the club for preseason training, sources have told ESPN.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Noskova outlasts Muchova in Wimbledon final
items.summary: Linda Noskova recovered from a second-set meltdown to overcome Karolina Muchova 6-2, 5-7, 6-3 in an all-Czech Wimbledon final on Saturday for her first Grand Slam trophy.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: England vs Norway: What time will Ellie Goulding perform during today's World Cup quarter-final?
items.summary: Ellie Goulding announced her England vs Norway performance on Instagram while publicly backing the England national team.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
